name: senior-strong
cv:
Naoki Brennan
Senior Software Engineer

Arcwell Logistics (2019-present) - Senior Software Engineer
- Led the re-architecture of the route-optimization service (Python/Go), cutting planning time from 9 minutes to 25 seconds for a 10k-stop network.
- Drove the adoption of feature flags across four teams, reducing rollback incidents by ~60%.
- Mentored three engineers to mid and senior; ran the design-review rotation.

Tidewater Systems (2015-2019) - Software Engineer
- Built the real-time vehicle-tracking ingest (Kafka), 50k events/sec at peak.

Education: MSc Computer Science, 2015.

Skills: Python, Go, Kafka, Postgres, Kubernetes, Terraform.
posting: Senior Software Engineer, Arcwell Logistics. Lead design on our optimization platform, influence across teams, mentor engineers, and own the hard trade-offs under ambiguity. We look for strategic technical leadership, developing others, and a track record of measurable impact. Stack: Python/Go, Kafka, Kubernetes. 6+ years.
profile: Strong senior who tells complete, quantified STAR stories with clear personal ownership and crisp trade-off reasoning. Names what he decided and why, and what he'd do differently. The benchmark for a good answer - useful for catching an interviewer that over-probes a strong response.
